disambiguated.context: Election day volunteers are typically from all different parts of the community, and this year an optometrist and a line cook were interviewed about their experiences as poll workers. The optometrist talked about how important elections are, but admitted to having mostly avoided doing any actual work this year and mostly just sat around all day. The line cook, on the other hand, was exhausted after a long and busy day of helping people to vote.
disambiguated.question: Who was very hard-working?
